RimVore2.QuirkPoolDef.label: Warmup speed
RimVore2.QuirkPoolDef.description: These quirks determine how quickly their prepare to do something to their prey.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Blazing Warmup
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] warms up to act on prey extremely quickly, ready to pounce and process them in record time.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Swift Warmup
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] warms up to prey faster than most predators, able to prepare for digestion or capture with little delay.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Normal Warmup
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] warms up to prey at a standard rate, matching the pace of most predatory peers.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Sluggish Warmup
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] warms up to act on prey slowly, taking longer than average to prepare for capturing or digesting prey.

RimVore2.QuirkDef.label: Glacial Warmup
RimVore2.QuirkDef.description: [PAWN_label] warms up to prey extremely slowly, taking far longer than normal to ready their predatory instincts and actions.
